# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of `teamspeak-go` is supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of `teamspeak-go` seriously. If you believe you've found a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue.

Instead, please report it to the maintainer via email at [ckr@chenkr.cn](mailto:ckr@chenkr.cn).

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix if the vulnerability is confirmed.
